convergence.evidence: P001, P004, P005, and P006 show distinct body plans, role masses, dominant ideas, faces, gestures, and prop classes. The tank trio separates yoke, shell clamp, and flesh fortress; humanoids separate ledger, stamp, slate, fist, ligament, and rifle. Muted dry materials provide world cohesion without collapsing the roster into one costume or demon family. No concrete visible regression is present on the eleven unchanged units.
